biological_replicate: Two Phialophora verrucosa strains (BMU 00512, BMU 04928) were isolated from facial and back skin tissues of a CARD9-deficient phaeohyphomycosis patient
technical_replicate: Three replicates were prepared and analyzed for each of the samples.
experimental_design: Two Phialophora verrucosa strains (BMU 00512, BMU 04928) were isolated from facial and back skin tissues of a CARD9-deficient phaeohyphomycosis patient ten years apart...
factor_value: isolated from facial and back skin tissues of a CARD9-deficient phaeohyphomycosis patient
number_of_fractions: peptides were separated with a gradient of 8% to 32% acetonitrile in 10 mM ammonium bicarbonate pH 9 over 60 min into 60 fractions.
number_of_technical_replicates: Three replicates were prepared and analyzed for each of the samples.
number_of_biological_replicates: Two Phialophora verrucosa strains (BMU 00512, BMU 04928) were isolated from facial and back skin tissues of a CARD9-deficient phaeohyphomycosis patient
number_of_samples: 2 strains described, each analyzed in 60 fractions.
